Frontend (FE) Logic: User types email/pass in app/page.tsx and clicks Log in
Backend (BE) Logic / API: POST /api/login receives the credentials and eventId

Frontend (FE) Logic: FE waits for the JSON response
Backend (BE) Logic / API: attemptLogin() in lib/accounts.ts verifies password against SQLite
createSession() in lib/session.ts generates a randomUUID
Database (DB) Update: INSERT into sessions table (ID email and 24h expiry)

Backend (BE) Logic / API: getSession() in lib/session.ts is called by the Server Component
Database (DB) Update: SELECT from sessions to check if ID exists and isn't expired
Browser State (Cookies): Browser automatically sends sessionId in header

Frontend (FE) Logic: User closes tab then re-opens /home 2 hours later
Database (DB) Update: getSession() runs again; verifies ID still exists in SQLite

Browser State (Cookies): DELETE row from sessions table matching the ID
column6: Browser receives instruction to Delete the cookie
